name: Plane Crash Ragdoll Simulator
description: As a fearless pilot, your mission is simple: survive a relentless onslaught of rockets targeting your aircraft. But dont be fooled by how easy it looks. Youll feel the rush of adrenaline as you fire rockets at your enemies and fly through dangerous skies! Features: - Many Game Modes: Avoid Rockets, Destroy Enemies and Low Fuel Landing! - Variety of Aircraft: from planes to helicopters - Customizable Skins: unlock various skins for character and aircraft - Realistic Physics &amp; Ragdoll Pilot! - Challenging Levels and Scenarios
instructions: Aircraft Gas Press the Joystick Aircraft Control Move the Joystick
tags: 3D, Action, Air, Aircraft, airplane, Casual, endless, fly, Mobile, Physics, Simulation, Simulator, unity, War
